pi_items.source: Task scripts (setup_task.sh and export_result.sh) create and check this specific path.
Task script (setup_task.sh) seeds this script and export_result.sh checks it.
Task description directly enumerates these six required statistics, and verifier.py rigorously checks for their presence in the bootstrap_ci.csv output.
Task description directly requires these four permutation tests.
R script execution on the MASS::birthwt dataset calculated diff_smoke = 283.78 and or_smoke = 2.02, confirming they both confidently fall within the respective claimed ranges.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world MASS::birthwt dataset collected at Baystate Medical Center during 1986. Empirical verification confirms the accuracy of the value ranges: executing R computations on the data yields a diff_smoke of 283.78 (falling within [150, 400]) and an or_smoke of 2.02 (falling within [1.5, 3.5]). All directory paths and expected metric arrays accurately reflect the task scripts and verifier logic.
